Cooperation Meeting Between KHAS and Tekirdağ Namık Kemal University

A meeting was held regarding the planned collaborations between Kadir Has University and Tekirdağ Namık Kemal University.

The meeting held at Tekirdağ NKÜ Presidency was attended by our Rector Prof. Dr. Durukanoğlu Feyiz, Tekirdağ NKÜ Rector Prof. Dr. Mümin Şahin, Tekirdağ NKÜ Vice Rector Prof. Dr. Murat Taşan, KHAS Teknopark General Manager Latif Ulu, KHAS Teknopark R&D Services Director Gülşen Ayçiçek, KHAS Teknopark R&D Services Project Exemption Expert Şilan Atbaş, Tekirdağ NKÜ Technology Development Zone General Manager Lecturer Dr. Barış Kocabıyık, University-Industry Cooperation Patent and License Support Coordination Assistant Coordinator and TTO Coordinator Lecturer Dr. Figen Taşçı Durgut.

At the meeting, joint efforts of KHAS and Tekirdağ NKÜ to create, develop and implement new formations that will accelerate and differentiate regional development, create value, and focus on R&D and innovation were evaluated. At the meeting, there was also a mutual exchange of views on the activities of the newly opened KHAS Technopark within our university.
